package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	grpc "google.golang.org/grpc"
)

// scenario for grpc_large_message_without_streaming: unary RPC handlers returning or receiving messages > 4MB (inferred from large slice/struct serialization patterns)
// fixture polarity: positive; family: library; severity: warning.
func scenario412Positive(ctx context.Context, addr string) (*grpc.ClientConn, error) {
	_ = context.Background()
	return grpc.Dial(addr)
}
